w:r.w:t: Portfolio piece + Fiverr showcase. Full shopping flow from browse to order.

SabiStyle is a Nigerian fashion e-commerce app that lets customers browse clothing, add items to cart, checkout via Paystack, and track their orders — all from a clean, fast mobile experience. The app is built for the African fashion market and is scoped as a production-ready MVP.
Customer — browses, wishlists, buys, tracks orders
Admin — manages products, orders, and promo codes via Supabase dashboard (no separate admin app in MVP)
Note: Admin actions in MVP are handled directly through the Supabase dashboard — no separate admin panel is built in Flutter for this version.
Logo animation, checks auth state, routes to Onboarding or Home
3 slides shown on first launch only. Stored in SharedPreferences
Full name, email, password, confirm password. Email verification required
Email + password. 'Forgot password?' link. Show/hide password toggle
Enter email, Supabase sends reset link to inbox
Hero banner (auto-scroll), featured products, new arrivals section, deals row
Top app bar: SabiStyle logo (left), cart icon with badge (right), search icon
Bottom nav bar: Home, Market, Wishlist, Orders, Profile
Hero banner: auto-scrolling image slider with PageView (3–5 banners from Supabase Storage)
Section headers: 'New Arrivals', 'Featured', 'Hot Deals' with 'See all' link
Product cards: image, name, price, 'Add to Wishlist' icon
Grid of categories (Men, Women, Accessories, Shoes, etc.) with icons
Products filtered by category. Filter by price, size, color. Sort: newest, price asc/desc
Image gallery (swipeable), size selector, color selector, description, reviews, Add to Cart / Wishlist
Search bar with live results, recent search history (local), no-results empty state
Grid of saved items. Each card shows image, name, price, Remove button, Add to Cart shortcut
List of items, quantity controls (+ / -), item subtotals, order total, promo code input, Proceed to Checkout button
Select saved address or add new one. Name, street, city, state, phone
Order summary: items, address, delivery estimate, total with breakdown
Paystack popup (card / bank transfer / USSD). Verifies payment on callback
Success screen with order number, estimated delivery, 'Continue Shopping' and 'View Order' buttons
List of all past orders. Status badge: Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled
Items in order, payment method, delivery address, status timeline tracker, Cancel button (if Pending)
Avatar, full name, email, edit button. Links to sub-screens
Update name, phone, profile photo (image_picker → Supabase Storage)
List of delivery addresses, add / edit / delete, set as default
Current password, new password, confirm. Supabase updateUser()
In-app list of notifications: order updates, promos, restocks. Unread badge on nav bar
Notification toggles, Privacy Policy (WebView), Terms & Conditions (WebView), App version, Logout, Delete Account
5. How Admin Adds Items to the Store
In MVP, there is no Flutter admin panel. The admin manages all store content directly through the Supabase Dashboard. Here is the exact workflow:
Log in to Supabase dashboard at app.supabase.com
Go to Storage → Create a bucket called 'products' (set to public)
Upload product images to Storage → copy the public URLs
Go to Table Editor → open the 'products' table
Click Insert Row and fill in: name, description, price, category_id, images (paste URLs as array), sizes, colors, stock_qty
Set is_featured = true if it should appear on the home feed
Set is_active = true to make it visible in the app
Upload category icon to Supabase Storage → copy URL
Insert row in 'categories' table: name, icon_url, display_order
All orders appear in the 'orders' table in real time
To update order status: find the order row, edit the 'status' column (pending → processing → shipped → delivered)
Customer sees the status update immediately in the app via Supabase realtime
Insert row in 'promo_codes' table: code, discount_type (percentage or fixed), discount_value, max_uses, expires_at
Customer enters the code at checkout — the app validates against this table
Post-MVP plan: Build a simple Flutter admin panel with product upload, image picker, and order management to replace the Supabase dashboard workflow.
Customer taps 'Pay' on the Checkout Review screen
App calls Paystack initialize endpoint with amount, email, and a unique reference
Paystack popup opens (card / bank transfer / USSD options)
On payment success, Paystack returns the reference to the app callback
App calls Paystack verify endpoint with the reference to confirm payment server-side
On verified: order record is created in Supabase with status = 'processing'
Customer is routed to Order Confirmation screen
Use flutter_paystack package. Initialize with your public key in main.dart. Use the charge() method with the amount in kobo (multiply Naira × 100).

GoRouter redirect checks AuthBloc state on every navigation. If AuthUnauthenticated and route requires auth → redirect to /login. If AuthAuthenticated and route is /login or /signup → redirect to /home.
Start Date: March 19 | Ship Date: April 30 | Duration: 6 Weeks
Goal: Project fully set up, Supabase live, Auth BLoC complete and tested.
Create Flutter project, set up folder structure, add all pubspec.yaml dependencies, configure .env
Set up Supabase project — create all 8 tables, Storage buckets, enable Realtime on notifications table
Configure get_it DI, write AuthRemoteDatasource and AuthRepository
Full AuthBloc (events, states, bloc) — already written, wire it up and test
GoRouter setup with auth guard, Splash screen with auth check routing
Onboarding screen (3 slides, SharedPreferences first-launch flag)
Sign Up screen + Login screen UI wired to AuthBloc
Goal: Auth fully working end-to-end. User can browse products and view details.
Forgot Password screen + error handling on all auth screens. End-to-end auth test: signup → verify → login → logout
Home screen — bottom nav shell, banner slider, featured products row, new arrivals
Category listing screen + product listing screen with filters
Product detail screen — image gallery, size/color selector, add to cart/wishlist buttons
SearchBloc + Search screen with live results and recent search history
Bug fixes from Week 2 — test full browse flow from home to product detail
Goal: User can wishlist items, build a cart, apply promo codes, and reach payment.
WishlistBloc + Wishlist screen. Wire wishlist button on product detail and home cards
CartBloc + Cart screen (add, remove, update quantity, item subtotals, order total)
Promo code input + validation against Supabase promo_codes table
AddressBloc + Saved Addresses screen (add, edit, delete, set default)
Checkout — Address selection screen wired to AddressBloc
Checkout — Order review screen (items, address, total breakdown)
Test full flow: add to cart → apply promo → select address → reach review screen
Goal: Full purchase flow working end-to-end. Orders visible and trackable.
Paystack setup — initialize charge with amount in kobo, handle success/failure callback
Payment verification + create order record in Supabase on verified payment
Order confirmation screen (order number, estimated delivery, CTA buttons)
OrderBloc + Order history screen with status badges
Order detail screen with status timeline tracker
Cancel order logic (only if status = pending)
End-to-end test: cart → pay → confirmed → visible in order history with correct status
Goal: Full user account management working. Real-time notifications live.
ProfileBloc + Profile screen (view name, email, avatar)
Edit profile — name, phone, avatar upload to Supabase Storage via image_picker
Change password screen wired to AuthBloc
NotificationBloc + Notification center screen with Supabase Realtime subscription
Unread notification badge on bottom nav bar wired to notification count
Settings screen — logout, delete account, T&Cs and Privacy Policy (WebView)
Test full profile flow: edit profile → change password → receive notification → settings
Goal: App is production-ready. APK built. Fiverr updated. Portfolio live.
Empty states on every screen (empty cart, no orders, no wishlist, no search results)
Loading skeletons on Home feed and Product listing screens
Error handling — no internet banner, retry buttons, graceful Supabase error messages
Full app walkthrough on physical Android device — log every bug and rough edge
Fix all bugs from walkthrough. Image caching check (cached_network_image everywhere)
Build release APK — flutter build apk --release. Fix any release-mode issues
Record screen demo video + take clean screenshots for portfolio and Fiverr gallery
✅ Push code to GitHub with clean README. Update Fiverr gig. SHIPPED.
Built by Michael | Flutter + Supabase + BLoC
